steps.action: Kummi is a folk dance, popular in Tamil Nadu and with weight transfer through footwork, pivot turn, hold hands, partner opposite, accent beat, grounded.
steps.text: Kummi is a folk dance, popular in Tamil Nadu and with weight transfer through footwork, pivot turn, hold hands, partner opposite, accent beat, grounded.

steps.action: In some places, it is very simple, with rhythmic
steps.text: In some places, it is very simple, with rhythmic clapping or beating of the drums.

steps.text: Kummi songs became a popular addition to kuthiyottam festivities in modern times.

steps.text: One village woman starts a popular song while others join in with singing and clapping to keep note of time.
